title: Question About Yuis Fate
wikitext:
[]: Question About Yui's Fate             Quote Post by DEMOLITION D+ » Thu Jul 09, 2009 4:51 pm Hey guys, first time poster here. Feels good Anyway, I have a question. I'm a long time Eva fan and I'm very seasoned in my Evangelion knowledge, but one thing has been bothering me that I haven't really been able to put my finger on. Exactly how did Yui die? And why was Gendo accused of murdering her? Was Yui sucked into Eva Unit-01? An indepth answer would be appreciated, thank you ahead of time

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Thu Jul 09, 2009 5:02 pm http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Yui_Ikari She was not killed, she became one with Eva 01 during the sync test. He was accused of murder cause she was not "seen" again. For the Eva to operate, it needs a soul to sync the Eva to the pilot more or less and Yui stepped up to the plate.

[]:             Quote Post by iamsolidsnake » Thu Jul 09, 2009 5:08 pm Yui didn't exactly die, she ceased to be, just as Shinji did, in the primordial soup lcl. Her body, like his, was broken down into the base elements that lead to life. Except she was never recovered like he was. Gendo was probably accused of not doing enough to save her, but as seen when Shinji de-formed/de-evolved, its not exactly something that's easy to do. Her soul was probably trapped there because it was a living vessel without a soul. Not to mention the semi-divine nature of eva's origin, that may have had something to do with it. I'd mainly bank on the living vessel without soul bit. A living being brought to life but without its on consciousness, one could argue that which has said/debated/argued about Rei and the well of souls could be said about eva unit 01- Its was the beginning of the end because it was a " child" born without a soul. That last bit is just a personal adition, but yeah, I think outside of that its pretty much all that can definitively be stated without conjecturing too unrealisticly. EDIT: NVM, we should all know to wiki this stuff, myself included. Yay for public displays of stupidity! Nothing like posting something after the wiki link. e-fail.

[]:             Quote Post by DEMOLITION D+ » Thu Jul 09, 2009 5:41 pm K, thanks a lot guys

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Fri Jul 10, 2009 9:51 am Otakon 08 Ikari wrote: For the Eva to operate, it needs a soul to sync the Eva to the pilot more or less and Yui stepped up to the plate.

[]:             Quote Post by Shin-seiki » Fri Jul 10, 2009 11:15 am FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: Otakon 08 Ikari wrote: For the Eva to operate, it needs a soul to sync the Eva to the pilot more or less and Yui stepped up to the plate.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Fri Jul 10, 2009 1:42 pm I don't know if she "stepped up to the plate", as it were. If she agreed to do that, then why was Gendo so desperate to bring her back? I'm askin' because I honestly don't know.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sat Jul 11, 2009 12:36 am Sudden enlightenment. Thanks, guys!

[]:             Quote Post by I Accidentally Dracula » Sun Jul 12, 2009 1:54 pm FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: I don't know if she "stepped up to the plate", as it were. If she agreed to do that, then why was Gendo so desperate to bring her back? I'm askin' because I honestly don't know.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sun Jul 12, 2009 2:35 pm I Accidentally Dracula wrote: Yui secretly allowed herself to enter a higher plain of existence to trump Gendo's selfish secret plans for world takeover, who in turn was trying to trump SEELE's selfish secret plans world takeover, who in turn were trying to trump NERV's selfish secret plans for world takeover, who in turn were manipulating the plucky NERV bunnies who thought they were going about the relatively simple task of saving the world. Whether or not Group A is transitively aware of Group C's motives, or B of D, or D of A, nobody knows. It's just one giant repeating Xanatos Roulette you don't want to think about.

[]:             Quote Post by I Accidentally Dracula » Sun Jul 12, 2009 5:12 pm Also, would Yui be considered to be the 0th Child(ren)?

[]:             Quote Post by juanagon » Sun Jul 12, 2009 5:16 pm Yui did it because it would mean that Shinji would have a fighting chance to survive against the future threat of the Angels. Without Yui there's no "Unit 01" and its awesome powers.

[]:             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Sun Jul 12, 2009 5:17 pm I Accidentally Dracula wrote: Also, would Yui be considered to be the 0th Child(ren)?

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sun Jul 12, 2009 10:18 pm but dude she gotz a plug suit u kno.

[]:             Quote Post by I Accidentally Dracula » Mon Jul 13, 2009 10:03 am She does? I was just going off of the fact that she was in 01's cockpit.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Mon Jul 13, 2009 10:40 am Kyoko qualifies then too.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Mon Jul 13, 2009 1:06 pm I Accidentally Dracula wrote: She does? I was just going off of the fact that she was in 01's cockpit.

[]:             Quote Post by I Accidentally Dracula » Mon Jul 13, 2009 1:37 pm Touji is neither moe or sexy.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Jul 13, 2009 1:40 pm AuraTwilight wrote: moe and sexy, which is pretty much the only basis for being an Eva Pilot,

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Tue Jul 14, 2009 1:25 pm I don't know, there's some Genbooru pictures that could convince one otherwise... Plus he totally didn't even get to do anything, so God made sure the rule wasn't really broken.
